integration.notes: Full 7-file integration pattern + design doc + init

root.notes: Entity model definitions importing from substrate.types

eos.integration_schema: v1 CRM-style (crm_contacts, crm_deals, crm_activities, tasks, agent_actions)
eos.runtime_activation_state: active — agents registered, integration handlers wired
eos.relation_to_saas: DIVERGENT — saas/db/schema.ts has v2 events-style schema, integration/tables.py has v1 CRM schema
eos.completeness_level: substantial — agents, views, workflows, integration all present but no frontend
risks: Schema v1/v2 split between projections/eos and saas/
entities.py references eos-ceo, eos-sales etc projection-prefixed agent names
No frontend — only backend integration + agent layer
Integration tables.py references deprecated CRM_CONTACTS_TABLE etc

integration.notes: Integration skeleton only — same 7-file pattern as EOS

creatoros.runtime_activation_state: dormant — integration code exists but no agents, views, or workflows
creatoros.relation_to_windows_dev: unknown — Beast inspection will reveal if full CreatorOS app exists
creatoros.completeness_level: minimal — integration skeleton only, no agents, no views, no workflows, no frontend
risks: Integration tables.py references data/repos/creatoros/shared/schema.ts which may not exist locally
No agents or business logic — skeleton only
Code duplication with EOS integration pattern (503 diff lines)

lyfeos.runtime_activation_state: dormant — integration code exists but no agents, views, or workflows
lyfeos.relation_to_windows_dev: unknown — Beast inspection will reveal if full LyfeOS app exists
risks: Code duplication with EOS/CreatorOS integration pattern
Likely placeholder until LyfeOS app development begins

code_duplication_analysis.pattern: 7-file integration pattern duplicated across all 3 projections
code_duplication_analysis.recommendation: Extract shared integration base into substrate or adapters — only schema-specific code differs

summary: EOS is the most complete projection (31 files, agents, views, workflows). CreatorOS and LyfeOS are integration skeletons only (8 files each). All three share a duplicated 7-file integration pattern. Schema v1/v2 split exists between projections/eos and saas/.
